Crunchbase Scout: Your private company research assistant.

Searches keywords across an organization’s associated full description, industries, industry groups, headquarters location, and region

Where the organization is headquartered

The postal code of Organization's HQ address

Descriptive keyword for an organization (e.g. Saas, Android, Cloud Computing, Medical Device)

Name of the Organization

Total number of employees

Date the organization was founded. You can also enter phrases like 'a year ago'

Companies that have at least one active job posting, powered by Jobbio

Involved in a given event(s) as a sponsor, exhibitor, or organization

Types of diversity represented in an organization, specifically of those who are founding members, currently the CEO, or have check-writing abilities in an investment firm. This feature is in beta and may change with future updates.

Available in the Crunchbase dataset but may need to be unlocked to view

Score that quantifies a private company’s current growth using both predictions and historical data

Score that indicates market interest based on profile activity in the media

Predicted likelihood of growth

Events that indicates a company's growth

Predicted likelihood of funding

Predicted likelihood of acquisition

Predicted likelihood of IPO

Key date associated with this Signal

See companies that have hired executives (VP and above) in a certain date range

See companies that have not had layoffs reported in a certain date range

Date of most recent Funding Round

Last funding round type (e.g. Seed, Series A, Private Equity)

Amount of most recent Funding Round

Total amount raised across all funding rounds

Has at least 1 investment from a given firm or individual

Shares investors with a particular company or several companies

Whether an Organization is for profit or non-profit

Operating Status of Organization e.g. Active, Closed

The acquisition status of an organization

The current public status of the Organization

Total (non-unique) visits to site for the last month; includes desktop and mobile web.

Companies that have recently searched for this topic
